content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.email.google_workspace
FILE: cosmos/integration/email/google_workspace.py (791 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Google Workspace Integration

"Good news, everyone! I can manage your Google Workspace email!"

Full Google Workspace / Gmail integration including:
- Email management (Gmail API)
- Calendar integration
- Mailbox filtering
- Admin functions (with proper permissions)

CLASSES:
- GoogleAuthType(Enum): Google authentication types.
- GoogleConfig: Google Workspace configuration.
- GmailMessage: Gmail message structure.
- GmailLabel: Gmail label.
- GoogleWorkspaceIntegration: Google Workspace / Gmail Integration.

Prerequisites:
1. Create project in Googl
  Methods: def get_auth_url(self, scopes: List[str]=None) -> str
  Methods: async def exchange_code_for_token(self, auth_code: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def authenticate_service_account(self, user_email: str=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_messages(self, user: str='me', query: str=None, label_ids: List[str]=None, max_result
  Methods: async def get_message(self, message_id: str, user: str='me', format: str='full') -> GmailMessage
  Methods: async def send_message(self, to: List[str], subject: str, body: str, cc: List[str]=None, bcc: List[s
  Methods: async def modify_message(self, message_id: str, add_labels: List[str]=None, remove_labels: List[str]
  Methods: async def trash_message(self, message_id: str, user: str='me') -> bool
